---
title: "The Buenos Aires Framework for Artificial Legal Personhood"
subtitle: "A permanent international research framework"
---

The Framework engineers durable, auditable answers to the questions raised when legal systems
begin to recognise **artificial legal persons** — entities with legal personality that are
operated by artificial intelligence.

This site is a generated visualization of the [repository](https://github.com/SCHADLER-ORG/baflp),
which is the single source of truth. Start with the **Concepts** — each is a reusable knowledge
object referenced throughout the Framework.

::: callout-note
Infrastructure status: bootstrap complete. Legal content is authored by the Chief Research
Architect through the RFC process and is published here as it is approved.
:::
